description: Uninitialized variable 'erab_status' used in conditional branch
impact: Undefined behavior: variable may contain garbage value, leading to incorrect error handling path

description: Potentially invalid shift: 'modulation_order << bit_width' may exceed type width
impact: On 32-bit ARM, shifting uint32_t by 32+ is undefined behavior

description: Code block is unreachable: condition 'header.dc == 0' can never be true at this point
impact: Dead code inside disabled preprocessor conditional (#ifdef ENABLE_5G_NR_RLC is not defined in LTE-only build)

description: Dereference of null pointer 'ue_ptr' returned from 'find_ue(rnti)'
code_snippet:
sched_ue* ue_ptr = find_ue(rnti);
ue_ptr->set_cfg(ue_cfg);  // NULL_RETURNS: find_ue may return nullptr
impact: Crash if UE not found in scheduler map — can happen during handover race condition

description: Resource leak: 'pcap_file' opened but not closed on error path
impact: File descriptor leak — in long-running eNB process, repeated open failures exhaust fd limit

description: Uninitialized struct member 'plmn_id.mcc' not set before comparison
impact: May match wrong PLMN due to garbage in .mcc field, causing UE to camp on wrong cell

description: Left shift '1 << nof_prb' where nof_prb could be up to 25 for 20MHz bandwidth
impact: False alarm for LTE bandwidths (max nof_prb=100 for 20MHz, but Coverity flags nof_prb=25 path). For BW <= 5MHz nof_prb <= 25, shift is safe. For BW > 5MHz, guard on next line prevents UB.

description: Unreachable default branch in switch over enum type
impact: Defensive code — the default branch is intentional safety net for future enum extensions

description: Buffer 'packed_msg' of size 1024 may overflow when packing large RRC message
impact: Stack buffer overflow for RRCReconfiguration with many bearers — exploitable in adversarial radio environment

description: Variable 'dci_msg.nof_bits' read before initialization in rare branch
impact: False alarm: memset initializes all fields to zero on line 155
